ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MODIFICATION OF VISITATION, CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2006, GRANTED SUBJECT TO WRITTEN ORDER ; PARTIES AND COUNSEL AGREED THAT REINSTATEMENT OF VISITATION WAS IN ORDER. MS. TRAPALIS TO PREPARE THE ORDER.
